meaning: adj.有缺陷的,(智商或行为有)欠缺的n.有缺陷的人,不完全变化动词
examples: Her hearing was found to be slightly defective.
A manufacturer negligently made and marketed a car with defective brakes.
It could be a gene that, defective in some way, predisposes a person to disease.
As it is, he anticipates that soon 70% of recruits will have defective vision.
